title: Regularization Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Regularization Techniques inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Label Smoothing
steps.summary: Label Smoothing belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Regularization Techniques. It sits inside Neural Networks / Regularization Techniques. Compare it with Label-Smoothing CE and Label Smoothing Techniques. It opens into Label-Smoothing CE and Label Smoothing Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Dropout
